references.author: M Simon
references.unstructured: Simon, M. et al. LINE1 derepression in aged wild-type and SIRT6-deficient mice drives inflammation. Cell Metab. 29, 871–885 (2019). This study shows that upregulation of L1 triggers an IFN-I response in Sirt6-knockout and normal aged mice, and that pathologies and lifespan of Sirt6 progeroid mice can be improved with NRTIs.
